message:
test(fcp-bootstrap): strengthen hardware-token discovery test coverage br-24llg.4.1

Add 17 unit tests and 2 integration tests for PKCS#11 hardware-token
discovery: multi-provider report aggregation, token identity matching
with unknown-field wildcards, all AuthenticatedSessionState variants
(display + serde), TokenDetectionReport JSON roundtrip,
select_bootstrap_token edge cases, HardwareTokenPin empty checks,
DetectionStage serde coverage, and session drop safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
